zh.lifeSummary: 當John Cavendish於1374年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可時，他的父親Sir John Cavendish11371歲，母親Alice de Odyngseles45歲。他和Johanna Clopton至少有5個兒子。他去世於1406年在英國倫敦享年32歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cavendish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Suffolk named Cavendish, from an Old English byname Cāfna (meaning ‘bold, daring’) + Old English edisc ‘enclosed pasture’. Cavendish is the surname of the Dukes of Devonshire. They are descended from Sir John Cavendish, who served as Chief Justice of the King's Bench (1372–81). Under the Tudors and Stuarts, a succession of shrewd and powerful heads of the family achieved political prominence and became extremely wealthy. William Cavendish, 2nd Earl of Devonshire, was a strong supporter of the ‘Glorious Revolution’ of 1688 and of William of Orange (William III) against James II. In 1694 he was created Duke of Devonshire. The Latin family motto, Cavendo tutus ‘safe through taking care’ is a pun on the surname.

Manx: Anglicized form of Corjeag, a shortened form of Mac Quartag ‘son of Svarteygr’ (from Old Norse, meaning ‘black-eyed’). Folk etymology interpreted Corjeag incorrectly as Manx curjeig ‘alms-dish’ and equally incorrectly supposed that the surname Cavendish was a synonym meaning ‘giving-dish’. Manxmen's familiarity with the English surname presumably led to the substitution.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Cavendish was born in 1374, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Cavendish, was 11371 and his mother, Alice de Odyngseles, was 45. He had at least 5 sons with Johanna Clopton. He died in 1406, in London, England, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Cavendish est né en 1374, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Cavendish, avait 11371 ans et sa mère, Alice de Odyngseles, avait 45 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Johanna Clopton. Il est décédé en 1406, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Cavendish 1374 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Cavendish 11371 und seine Mutter Alice de Odyngseles 45. Er hatte mit Johanna Clopton mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1406 im Alter von 32 Jahren in London, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Cavendish è nato il nel 1374 nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Cavendish, aveva 11371 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Odyngseles, aveva 45 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli con Johanna Clopton. Morì nel 1406, nel London, England, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Cavendishが1374年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Sir John Cavendishは11371歳，母Alice de Odyngselesは45歳であった。彼はJohanna Cloptonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼は1406年にイギリスロンドンで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Cavendish(이)가 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Cavendish(은)는 11371세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Odyngseles(은)는 45세였다. 그는 Johanna Clopton(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1406년 영국 런던에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Cavendish nasceu em 1374, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Cavendish, tinha 11371 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Odyngseles, tinha 45 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Johanna Clopton. Ele faleceu em 1406, em London, Inglaterra, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Cavendish родился в 1374 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Cavendish было 11371 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Odyngseles, 45. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Johanna Clopton. Он умер в 1406 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Cavendish nació en 1374, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Cavendish, tenía 11371 años y su mamá, Alice de Odyngseles, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con Johanna Clopton. Murió en 1406, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 32 años.
